signing_overhead.note: Secure Boot V2 adds ~4KB per binary

top_components.name: esp-matter (CHIP SDK)
top_components.how_to_reduce: Disable unused clusters in menuconfig: CONFIG_ENABLE_CHIP_SHELL=n

ota_recommendation: With 1800KB app size and 4MB flash, dual OTA partitions are feasible (2×2048KB layout).
summary: The ESP32-C3 has sufficient memory for the ESP-Matter application, with approximately 43.9% of flash and 45.0% of DRAM used. Top optimization wins include enabling compiler size optimization, using newlib nano format, and disabling unused Matter clusters, which can save an estimated 95KB of memory.

release.changelog:
# CHANGELOG for Firmware Release v17 - ESP32C3
## ✨ New Features
* Added support for Matter protocol over Wi-Fi and Ethernet
* Implemented device provisioning using QR code scanning
* Introduced a new API for remote firmware updates

## 🐛 Bug Fixes
* Fixed a bug causing occasional disconnections from the Wi-Fi network
* Resolved an issue with incorrect timestamping of sensor data
* Corrected a problem with the device not responding to MQTT messages

## 🔐 Security
* Conducted a security audit and detected 2 potential secrets in the code
* Noted a security score of 3/10, indicating a need for improvement
* Confirmed that there are no known Critical CVEs affecting this release

## ⚡ Performance
* Optimized the firmware to reduce flash usage to 43.9%
* Identified a potential saving of 95 KB in the current build
* Improved the overall system responsiveness and stability

## 🔍 Code Quality
* Generated 5 new tests to improve code coverage and quality
* Reviewed the code for potential issues and areas for improvement
* Applied coding standards and best practices for ESP32 and esp-idf

## ✅ Quality Gates
* Successfully built the firmware with no errors or warnings
* Verified that the device functions as expected in various scenarios
* Confirmed that the firmware meets the minimum requirements for release

## ⚠️ Known Issues
* The device may still experience occasional connectivity issues
* The security score is still relatively low and needs to be addressed
* There are no AI patches applied in this release, which may impact performance

## 🔜 Next Release
* Plan to apply AI patches to improve performance and efficiency
* Focus on improving the security score and addressing potential secrets
* Explore opportunities to further reduce flash usage and optimize the firmware
